button.cannotExtendNow: Unable to extend time at this moment
button.help: Extend service time for this booking

modal.title: Extend service time
modal.noOptionsHint: This may be because the maximum number of extensions has been reached or the booking is not in an eligible status.
modal.notesPlaceholder: e.g. I would like to extend the time because...
modal.payImmediately: Payment will be processed immediately after confirmation
modal.acceptTerms: I agree to the additional payment of ฿{{amount}} for extending the service time and understand that payment will be processed immediately after confirmation
modal.alertAcceptTerms: Please accept the additional payment terms

payment.title: Time extension payment
payment.promptpayDesc: Scan QR with your banking app
payment.scanQR: Scan the QR with your banking app to pay
payment.securityNotice: Payment is secured by SSL and Omise
payment.errPaymentFailed: Payment failed. Please try again or contact support.
payment.errQRFailed: Unable to generate QR. Please try again
payment.errGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
payment.errBankFailed: Unable to connect to the bank. Please try again
payment.errSystemNotReady: Payment system is temporarily unavailable. Please wait a moment.

pending.errSubmitFailed: Unable to submit the extension request
pending.errSubmitRetry: Unable to submit the extension request. Please try again.
pending.errSubmitGeneric: An error occurred while submitting the request
pending.awaitingTitle: Waiting for admin to confirm the extension
pending.awaitingBody: Pay via the QR code below (฿{{amount}}), then send the payment slip to the admin via LINE OA. The admin will confirm to add the time so the staff can continue.
pending.awaitingBodyWithRef: Pay via the QR code below (฿{{amount}}), then send the payment slip to the admin via LINE OA — booking reference {{bookingNumber}}. The admin will confirm to add the time so the staff can continue.
